index.dir.label: What We Do
index.dir.title: Business Directions
index.dir.sub: JSC ROSATOM ENERGOKHIMTEKHNOLOGII brings together a team of design engineers, technologists and analysts with extensive experience in nuclear industry projects. Our expertise focuses on areas where reliability and safety requirements are highest — from developing unique high-efficiency sorbents to designing NPP power output schemes.
index.dir1.title: Termoxid Sorbents
index.dir1.desc: Production of selective inorganic sorbents based on zirconium compounds for purification of NPP process water and LRW processing.
index.dir2.title: Power System Modeling
index.dir2.desc: Consulting and development of NPP, thermal and hydro power plant output schemes. Mode calculations and power supply optimization for industrial consumers.
index.dir3.title: Engineering & Energy Services
index.dir3.desc: Comprehensive solutions for design, commissioning and modernization of energy facilities of any scale and complexity.
index.dir4.title: Water Treatment & Purification
index.dir4.desc: Pre-design surveys, development of process flow diagrams, supply of filter materials and comprehensive water treatment systems.

index.adv.label: Advantages
index.adv.title: Why Choose Us
index.adv1.title: Proprietary Technologies
index.adv1.desc: Unique zirconium-based sorbent production technologies developed by our specialists and protected by patents.
index.adv2.title: Reliability & Quality
index.adv2.desc: The company holds four active compliance certificates (GOST R ISO 9001-2015, 14001-2016, 45001-2020, 19443-2020).
index.adv3.title: Expert Team
index.adv3.desc: Highly qualified specialists with extensive experience in nuclear power and related industries: candidates of technical sciences, engineers accredited by Rostechnadzor.
index.adv4.title: Environmental Safety
index.adv4.desc: Our technologies significantly reduce the volume of liquid radioactive waste and minimize radionuclide release into the environment.
index.adv5.title: Comprehensive Approach
index.adv5.desc: From design and equipment supply to installation, commissioning and service — we implement turnkey projects.
index.adv6.title: Rosatom Reliability
index.adv6.desc: We are part of the State Nuclear Energy Corporation ROSATOM, guaranteeing the highest level of responsibility and reliability.
index.news.label: Latest
index.news.title: News & Events
index.news1.title: Strategic session held at JSC Rosatom Energokhimtech
index.news1.excerpt: In December 2025, a strategic planning session was held at the company, where key development directions for the upcoming period were identified.
index.news2.title: GOST R ISO compliance certificates obtained
index.news2.excerpt: The certification body LLC TSTKAO-expert issued four compliance certificates: GOST R ISO 9001-2015, 14001-2016, 45001-2020 and 19443-2020. All certificates are valid until December 16, 2028.
index.news3.title: Legal address and KPP changed as of October 23, 2025
index.news3.excerpt: JSC Rosatom Energokhimtekhnologii announces a change of legal address and KPP. Please use the updated details when processing documents.
index.cert.label: Documents & Certificates
index.cert.title: Quality Standards Compliance
index.cert.sub: Our operations comply with the requirements of quality management systems in the nuclear energy sector and related industries.
index.cta.title: Ready to Discuss Your Project?
index.cta.desc: Our specialists will answer all questions and offer the optimal solution for your task.
